message: One platform to learn, build, practice, and master AI.

scenes.title: Opening
onscreen: Learn AI. Build AI. Master AI.
The Open Source AI Learning Platform
scenes.voiceover: AI is moving fast. Learning it should not feel fragmented, slow, or closed.

scenes.title: Problem
onscreen: Too many resources. No roadmap. No build path.
scenes.voiceover: Most people learn AI across random tabs, disconnected tutorials, and scattered advice.

scenes.title: Platform Reveal
onscreen: One platform to learn, build, practice, and master AI.
scenes.voiceover: AIByDM brings the journey into one command center: learning, tools, practice, exams, and community signal.

scenes.title: Learn Platform
scenes.voiceover: Start with foundations, then move through connected lessons that keep theory, code, tools, and outcomes in the same system.

scenes.title: Roadmap Engine
onscreen: Know exactly what to learn next.
scenes.voiceover: The roadmap makes progression visible, from fundamentals to machine learning, deep learning, transformers, LLM engineering, RAG, and agents.

scenes.title: Build By Doing
scenes.voiceover: This is not passive content. It is a build-first system designed to turn reading into repetition and repetition into capability.

scenes.title: Tools Platform
onscreen: Discover the best open source AI tools.
scenes.voiceover: The tools layer helps learners understand where frameworks, vector databases, and local model runtimes fit into real workflows.

scenes.title: Games And Exams
scenes.voiceover: Quizzes, flashcards, and question banks close the loop with fast recall, explanations, and measurable progress.

scenes.title: Open Source
scenes.voiceover: Because AIByDM is open source, the platform grows with its community, not behind a paywall.

scenes.title: Closing
scenes.voiceover: Learn AI. Build AI. Master AI. Start your journey with AIByDM.

readme30.voiceover: AIByDM is one platform to learn, build, practice, and master AI. Follow structured learning paths, discover practical open source tools, and reinforce progress with games and exams. Learn AI. Build AI. Master AI. Start your journey at AIByDM.

social15.voiceover: AIByDM is the open source platform to learn AI, build real skills, and practice with purpose. Start your journey with AIByDM.
